_about: Frozen prompt-tuning subset (22 of 88). Replayed identically across tuning iterations via --only so results are comparable; headline numbers come only from full no-subset runs. Composition: every warningFederal strict miss from the post-audit baseline (curved cans, faint print, glare, side crops, run-to-run flicker), three watch photos (two labels GT-corrected to warningPresent=true by the 2026-06 visual audit, plus IMG_6292 — the one verified intermittent warning hallucination), and nine zero-flip regression guards. Guards cover each behavior a warning-transcription change could break: easy pass (6220), negative control with no warning in frame (6233), curved-can hard pass (6239), Serving-Facts can pass (6249), ABV-correctly-null pass (6252), fine-print ABV pass (6257), sideways curved pass (6271), sideways pass (6316), and a state (non-federal) warning that must NOT match the federal text (6338).
